criteria: TAM/SAM credibility under locked global persona
Unit economics ($0.038/DAU vs $4.99 Pro at 3.1% conv = positive)
GTM channel concreteness (PWA install, Slack, embed, B2B brief)
Defensibility (multi-agent moat, data moat, curator brand, network effect)

top5_curated.rationale: ONLY advocate that turns Business Case 30% into a screenshot-able receipt: $4.99 Stripe, 6-month MRR ladder $420→$10.8K, $0.038/DAU cost ceiling, 3.1% conv. Every claim is an artifact judges can audit in 2 min. Unit economics math closes without VC.

Adds a $1,200/brief × 50 logos B2B revenue line WITHOUT leaving Track 1 — same code, brand-brief embedding swap. ARPU 240× consumer. Brand-safety agent is a cleaner B2B narrative than consumer trend-safety. Defensible via SAML/audit/residency moat.

$386.10 of $500 GCP credit ledger proves multi-agent is the CHEAPEST credible architecture (caching > recompute). Cost moat = competitive moat. Directly defends the $4.99 price point's gross-margin viability. Itemized RapidAPI line satisfies disclosure rule.

Network effect = real defensibility. Friends-as-signal raises novelty 0.82→0.86 in 3 days = compounding data moat. Curator subscriptions ($X/mo to follow @handle) is a second revenue stream beyond Pro. Highest LTV ceiling of any consumer variant.

0-install B2B distribution via Slack/Discord — meets creator-agencies/marketing teams where they already are. Slash-command UX = sticky team workflow. Bypasses PWA install-friction CAC. PWA still ships (spec compliance preserved). High Demo 20% wow-factor in 2-min.

near_miss.reason: Strong syndication GTM but breaks PWA spec lock — risky for compliance review; B2B revenue path less concrete than enterprise-buyer.
Sponsorship+Pro split is novel but uncertain MRR; OSS distribution moat exists but slow vs deadline.
D7 retention 0.41→0.62 boosts LTV but no direct revenue artifact; gamification fights persona's 'discovery enthusiast' framing.
